channel.title: Distributed-Systems on Pi Stack
channel.description: Recent content in Distributed-Systems on Pi Stack

item.title: Self-Hosted Distributed Locking: etcd vs ZooKeeper vs Consul vs Redis 2026
item.description: When multiple services need coordinated access to a shared resource, a distributed lock is the answer. Whether you’re running scheduled jobs across kubernetes pods, managing leader election in a microservices cluster, or preventing double-processing in a distributed queue, picking the right locking primitive matters.

item.title: Ceph vs GlusterFS vs MooseFS: Best Self-Hosted Distributed Storage 2026
item.description: When your data outgrows a single server, you face a critical infrastructure decision: how do you store files across multiple machines without sacrificing reliability, performance, or your budget? Commercial cloud storage is expensive at scale, and single-disk solutions create single points of failure.
